meta.derivation: Components from hand-fill (U+F500..F545). Composed syllables from font grid rows/cols indexed by manifest initial×final order (U+F040..F4F9).

compose.with_medial: initial top-left, medial bottom-left, final right
notes: Compound finals use bottom + right layout per chart 3 rule 4.
Medial iu does not distinguish yu; use iu medial + u final per rule 5.

tones.note: entering tone; often represented by -q final
